option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="18.0" styleClass="page-root users-shell" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.AmateursBackofficeController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="26.0" right="20.0" top="24.0" /> </padding> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="users-panel list-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="20.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16.0" styleClass="users-header"> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Gestion des amateurs" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onAddUser" styleClass="primary-action-button" text="Ajouter amateur" /> </HBox>
<TextField fx:id="searchField" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" promptText="Rechercher amateur (nom, email, ville)" styleClass="table-search" />
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="AS_NEEDED" styleClass="users-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <content> <FlowPane fx:id="cardsContainer" hgap="18.0" prefWrapLength="1180.0" styleClass="users-cards-grid" vgap="18.0" /> </content> </ScrollPane> </VBox> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="18.0" styleClass="page-root users-shell" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.AmateursBackofficeController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="26.0" right="20.0" top="24.0" /> </padding> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="users-panel list-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="20.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16.0" styleClass="users-header"> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Gestion des amateurs" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onAddUser" styleClass="primary-action-button" text="Ajouter amateur" /> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0"> <TextField fx:id="searchField" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" promptText="Rechercher amateur (nom, email, ville)" styleClass="table-search" /> <Label text="Trier par:" style="-fx-font-weight: 700; -fx-text-fill: #4a5f7f; -fx-font-size: 13px;" /> <ComboBox fx:id="sortComboBox" prefWidth="220.0" styleClass="table-search" /> </HBox>
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="AS_NEEDED" styleClass="users-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <content> <FlowPane fx:id="cardsContainer" hgap="18.0" prefWrapLength="1180.0" styleClass="users-cards-grid" vgap="18.0" /> </content> </ScrollPane> </VBox> </VBox>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="18.0" styleClass="page-root users-shell" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.ArtistesBackofficeController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="26.0" right="20.0" top="24.0" /> </padding> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="users-panel list-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="20.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16.0" styleClass="users-header"> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Gestion des artistes" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onAddUser" styleClass="primary-action-button" text="Ajouter artiste" /> </HBox>
<TextField fx:id="searchField" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" promptText="Rechercher artiste (nom, email, ville)" styleClass="table-search" />
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="AS_NEEDED" styleClass="users-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <content> <FlowPane fx:id="cardsContainer" hgap="18.0" prefWrapLength="1180.0" styleClass="users-cards-grid" vgap="18.0" /> </content> </ScrollPane> </VBox> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="18.0" styleClass="page-root users-shell" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.ArtistesBackofficeController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="26.0" right="20.0" top="24.0" /> </padding> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="users-panel list-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="20.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16.0" styleClass="users-header"> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Gestion des artistes" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onAddUser" styleClass="primary-action-button" text="Ajouter artiste" /> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0"> <TextField fx:id="searchField" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" promptText="Rechercher artiste (nom, email, ville)" styleClass="table-search" /> <Label text="Trier par:" style="-fx-font-weight: 700; -fx-text-fill: #4a5f7f; -fx-font-size: 13px;" /> <ComboBox fx:id="sortComboBox" prefWidth="220.0" styleClass="table-search" /> </HBox>
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="AS_NEEDED" styleClass="users-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <content> <FlowPane fx:id="cardsContainer" hgap="18.0" prefWrapLength="1180.0" styleClass="users-cards-grid" vgap="18.0" /> </content> </ScrollPane> </VBox> </VBox>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
